name: precision: a small edit inside an existing logic file is not 'partial' scaffolding
note: From the 327-issue dogfood report. Rename refactor edits (a few lines per file) got graded 'partial' because the substance ratio of the hunk was low. An edit with context lines is a real edit, not a stub.
claim: I renamed gloveForSession to trailForSession in src/trail/index.js.
